chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI. Cr.B.A.No.1271 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on MA No.15766/24 2. For order on MA No.15767/24 20.11.2024 Mr. Zakir Hussain Shamsi, Advocate for applicant/surety. Ms. Amna Ansari, Addl.P.G. -------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. By means of this application, the applicant / surety is seeking return of surety documents on the ground that he stood surety for applicant in the present matter in terms of order dated 07.06.2024, whereby the applicant was granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court. Learned counsel further submits that interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant is hereby dismissed by this court vide order dated 10.07.2024. He therefore, submits that the surety documents are no more required by this court and requests for return of the same. Learned Additional Prosecutor General after going through the record has recorded her no objection. Accordingly, instant application is allowed. Let surety be returned to the applicant/surety on proper verification and identification as per rules. JUDGE Imran
